ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character the actor plays */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., lead, supporting, cameo) */,
  "cast_order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the credits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cast member entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cast member entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_members_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_members_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the award is associated with */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Whether the award was won */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cast member the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_versions_cast_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_id") REFERENCES cast_members ("cast_id")
)
